name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-64
title: test files often hard-code repo root depth via os.path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, '../../../..')
description: test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG2-python-only.py line 9 uses 'os.path.abspath(os.path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "../../../.."))' to derive REPO_ROOT instead of git rev-parse like other tests. test-repo-permissions.py line 10 uses similar relative paths. If the feature directory ever moves, these tests silently compute the wrong REPO_ROOT. Standardize on the 'git rev-parse --show-toplevel' pattern used by other tests.
